title: Gander's Goofy Foods
description: A Goofy Food Mod Made By GanderBeam, Suggested By His Viewers.
body:
**_GanderBeam's Dumb Foods_**

***

### **_Based On YOUR Ideas From Youtube!_**

Everything In This Mod Is Listed In This Video Here:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ItveoUuSJ84" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

***

## Includes 25+ New Items And Weapons Based On YouTube Comments!

All Of The Food Items And Weapons Are Entirely Unique And Inspired By My Viewers Cursed Comments! Especially Fun With Friends!

![All Of The Items Inside The Mod! (27 Total Items Based On Viewer's Ideas!)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f168a03137db269546dc0fead9d9f56c8744936_0.webp) 

***

### Food Items And Weapons:

*   Dark Burger (_food_) Sends You To The End Dimension (Placement is random).
    
*   Moldy Bred (_food_) Just A Piece Of Moldy Bred.
    
*   Sharp Candy Cane (_weapons_) A VERY Sharp Piece Of Candy Cane.
    
*   The Unsubscribe And The Subscribe Button (_food_) Just To Do A Little Plugin Or Two ;)
    
*   Milk And Lemon Smoothie (_food_) A Weird Combination Of Two Different Items.
    
    *   Also adds lemons as a separate item!
*   Tide Pods (_food_) A Very Scrumptious Item That Is For Sure Safe To Eat (Don't Eat IRL).
    
*   Rotten Flesh Cake (_food_) A Cake Made Out Of Rotten Flesh.
    
*   Tooth Paste (_food_) To Make A Weird Combination Of Items.
    
*   Orange Juice (_food_) Do NOT Combine With Toothpaste.
    
*   Cakkot (_food_) A Sharp Version Of A Carrot.
    
*   Pepperoni Pizza (_food_) Comes With A Raw Version!
    
*   Tomatoes (_food_) Just Your Casual Fruit
    
*   Pepperoni (_food_) A Pizza Topping For The Ages.
    
*   Cheese (_food_) Another Classic Pizza Topping.
    
*   Needle (_weapon_) A Device Used To Help Cook A Pizza.
    
*   Pizza Sauce (_food_) A Squished Down Tomato.
    
*   BreadBomb (_weapons_) A Dangerous Version Of Bread.
    
*   Waffle Ice (_food_) A Frozen Waffle Covered In Ice.
    
*   Notch Donut (_food_) Who Doesn't Like A Good Classic Overpowered Item?
    
*   Soggy Cardboard Sandwich (_food_) A Delicious Sandwich.
    
*   Tooth Paste In Oreos (_food_) A Super Cursed Combination.
    
*   Beans (_food_) The MOST Cursed Item In The Mod.
